verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'd like to write a song about our love And all the precious moments we have shared till now; But I'd rather write about our Lord above, Because it was Him who brought this union all about.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: As our hearts are joined we give them back to God, So that His perfect will can lead us in our lives; And through the years in all the good times and the trials, We will pray His Love will guide us day and night.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A marriage takes more than two, It takes three; So I pray that He will work through you and me.
